title: Senior Plant Manager at Procter & Gamble India

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Procter & Gamble India
jsonLd.description:
Procter & Gamble India has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Raipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Procter & Gamble India:
Procter & Gamble India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Procter & Gamble India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
